name: small room
hints: A room with a fortune telling machine and a sign. The machine may give useful advice.
READ SIGN for information. The fortune machine needs a coin to operate.
Use a coin in the fortune machine for a cryptic hint about the game.
E goes to the merry-go-round room. D goes to the knob room. GET SIGN if you need it.
notes: Fortune telling room reached via PULL BLUE in room 10. Fortune machine gives hints with a coin. E=merry-go-round room (21), D=knob room (10).
